name: Sword in the Stone
description: This mod adds fun unique swords that you can find throughout your world! Each one has random stats and a random magical ability.

name: Bananarangs
description: This mod adds the upgradeable bananarang (banana boomerang), a fun, modular, vanilla-friendly weapon.

name: Snowball Fight
description: This mod turns combat in snowy biomes into a snowball fight. Made for Winterjam 2023.

name: Reinnovation
description: Adds new redstone blocks made from vanilla materials to allow for more automation. Made for Curseforge Modding Madness 2024.

name: Stardew Fishing
description: Making fishing fun with a minigame directly inspired by Stardew Valley! Commissioned by garflemn.

name: Wild Iron
description: Adds a wild west themed pistol item for early and late game. Commissioned by Just Conquran.

name: Shardborne
description: A dungeon crawl ARPG modpack currently in development by a volunteer team of developers, designers, builders, and artists.
